{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220215530B4AA6C974CDA4998F1D"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602930400015172377","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好耶是新书，大大加油呀( *ˊᵕˋ)✩︎‧₊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770197254,"group_id":"7359948735087922238","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活给我一拳，我笑着说众独好甜（雷ch，国运版）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8dV1NX4g9MQpH/nW2V5W/g=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d30d9227b41742c8bb8ee7eadbf9b8ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710332&x-signature=%2F%2Bg7hk1aUTofwmF7hm1yJdW0zmg%3D","user_id":"3958762031","user_name":"众独啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3958762031","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7359948735087922238","book_info":{"abstract":"【主晏】江叔出场略晚。主名柯+银魂+文野，有刀剑和成龙历险记乱入，但是戏份不多。
OOC预警！海量私设预警！！！
应该是轻松加救赎向，如果能接受，请各位客官看文案：
正经版：少东家穿越了，并且完美降落敌方大本营，面对虎视眈眈的大boss，他沉默了。
向前一步是做人体实验的变态老头，后退一步是妄图毁灭世界的双重人格，暗处还有个活了千年的阴暗批暗戳戳搞事。
在压抑中，少东家爆发了，杀完你的杀你的，杀完你的再杀你的。
而作为一个成功的男人，身后总站着一个默默守护的爱人，什么你说对方不是爱人？没关系，表白后就是了。等等，你说你是江晏？！
搞笑版：我本是神仙渡不羡仙少东家，如今遭奸人所害流落异世界，今天是疯狂星期四，V我50聆听我的复仇计划。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7a2ea6cbb32cbaa6ba421e6512119310~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"微糍","author_id":"","book_id":"7359948735087922238","book_name":"综漫：少东家他开挂了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2022人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":829,"name":"年下","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=829&name=年下&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598839818147070488","read_count":"2022","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"122338"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"63","tags":"双男主,纯爱,综漫,年下,强强","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a2ea6cbb32cbaa6ba421e6512119310~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300953&x-signature=HQeziMKrSbEbWb8EICoE%2Bg9Ccro%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"484256559662787","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"18"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220215530B4AA6C974CDA4998F1D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10
